case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ANTHONY FEDERICO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ; CONDITIONAL SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT FEDERICO, ANTHONY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEDERICO, ANTHONY $3,428.18 PRINCIPAL, $603.83 INTEREST, $509.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,541.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
